Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Distribution From Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Joseph Powell for Meu Ling Chan via Court Call.
Karen Schmidt for and with Yen Collender via Court Call.

Ms. Collender stated that she did not know her half sister was her mother's daughter, half sister Meu Ling lived in Hong Kong, and she only grew up with Wendy. The Court granted the petition for determination of entitlement to distribution from estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Distribution From Estate
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Oct-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yen Collender in Propria Persona (Administrator) via Court Call

Ms. Collender requested a continuance, stating that she has been in contact with the Probate Referee, only one property has been appraised, that there are 2 more properties and many mutual funds/stocks that have not been appraised yet. The status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Collender to contact the Probate Examiner at least 2 weeks prior to the hearing date if the Inventory and Appraisal is not ready to be filed.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yen Collender in Propria Persona.
Richard Collender also present.

Ms. Collender stated that her Sister never married, that she had no children, that there are no other Brothers or Sisters, that her Parents are not living and were deceased a long time ago and that she read the duties and liabilities. The Court informed Ms. Collender that she needs to do an inventory and appraisal of all of the assets, that she needs to contact the Creditors and that she can not withdraw any funds without a Court order. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for March 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
